The Aberdeenshire Council area includes all of the area of the historic counties of Aberdeenshire and Kincardineshire (except the area making up Aberdeen City council area), as well as part of Banffshire.
The county boundaries are officially used for a few purposes, namely land registration and lieutenancy.
